name: plato-testing
description: MCP server for testing Plato TUI

tools.name: shell_exec
tools.description: Execute whitelisted shell commands in Plato workspace

command.description: Command to execute (git, node, npm, pnpm, jest, etc.)

tools.name: run_plato_pty
tools.description: Run Plato TUI in a PTY and interact with it

tools.name: test_components
tools.description: Run Ink component tests with ink-testing-library

tools.name: run_e2e_test
tools.description: Run full E2E PTY test suite

prompts.name: test_plato
prompts.prompt: Build Plato, run unit tests, component tests, and E2E PTY tests. Report on any failures.

prompts.name: debug_plato
prompts.prompt: Start Plato in PTY, send test inputs, and capture output for debugging.
